description: A campaign highlighting an artist and their sticker collection. This can be used to highlight products, portfolios, upcoming events, or anything else that fits the layout.

designer.description: Hi! My name is Melissa Hickman. I'm an industrial & organizational psychologist, with several years of digital marketing experience. I focus on UX & aesthetic design. I'm based out of Boulder, Colorado. I love working with eCommerce brands and creating high-converting Shopify stores & email campaigns. Aside from my professional life, I love fitness, nutrition & getting outside with the dogs.

Onto Your Next Project

Unleash your inner creativity through this unique collection that's sure to add as dash of 'cute-ness' to your project. This collection includes 6 water-proof vinyl stickers.
